QQQ.thesis: Core tech index holding. Broad NASDAQ exposure as the primary market vehicle.

GOOG.thesis: AI monetization via Search + Cloud. Thesis intact as long as search market share holds and cloud growth continues.

META.thesis: Ad revenue recovery + AI integration into Reels and Llama. Strong FCF generation.

AMZN.thesis: AWS growth + ad revenue acceleration. Margin expansion story.

ASML.thesis: EUV monopoly. AI chip demand requires more lithography equipment. Long-term secular.

RKLB.thesis: Rocket Lab as small-sat launch leader. High risk, high asymmetry.

UBER.thesis: Platform network effects. Autonomous vehicle transition risk partially priced in.

MSFT.thesis: Azure + Copilot monetization. Defensive tech with AI upside.

JPM.thesis: Best-in-class bank. Rate environment benefits NIM. Defensive allocation.

TSLA.thesis: EV market leader but margins under pressure. Speculative hold.

NFLX.thesis: Ad-supported tier + password sharing crackdown driving subscriber growth.

IGV.thesis: Software ETF exposure. Broad SaaS bet on rate stabilization.

FICO.thesis: Credit scoring monopoly. Price increases flow directly to margin.

RGTI.thesis: Quantum computing lottery ticket. Small position, high speculative upside.
